title: Bull of the Day: Gartner (IT)
text: Beat-and-raise quarter for IT consulting & research firm signals Tech Super Cycle alive & well

title: Gartner: IT Backbone With A $200 Billion TAM
text: Gartner is a leading technology research firm which is most known for its "Magic Quadrant" benchmarking of enterprise software. The company has announced strong second quarter financial results which beat top and bottom line consensus estimates.

title: Gartner Research Board Heralds a New Era of Digital Productivity
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--There will be decreasing prominence of digital technologies in the next era, according to the Gartner Research Board.

title: Can Gartner Keep Up the Growth?
text: In his second-quarter 2022 letter to investors, Ron Baron (Trades, Portfolio) of Baron Funds noted some investors had lost faith in Gartner Inc. ( IT , Financial). He said they were concerned about the effects a potential recession could have on the company.

title: Gartner (IT) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, 2022 EPS Guidance Up
text: Gartner (IT) second-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues surge year over year.

title: Gartner, Inc.'s (IT) CEO Gene Hall on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 2, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Gene Hall – Chief Executive Officer Craig Safian – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Jeff Meuler – Baird Heather Balsky – Bank of America George Tong – Goldman Sachs Greg Parrish – Morgan Stanley Andrew Nicholas – William Blair Seth Weber – Wells Fargo Operator Welcome to Gartner's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Gartner (IT) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Gartner (IT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 33.18% and 4.39%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Gartner Reports Second Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) today reported results for the second quarter of 2022 and updated its financial outlook for the full year 2022.
